name: Support-Hub
intro: Ticketing system, support request platform, helpdesk web application
description: Handles feedback, ratings and bug/support tickets including file attachments across multiple applications via REST API.
impact: Designed to handle support requests systematically rather than exposing a personal email to contact
Built to register users automatically on request and clients on admin permission only
Advanced database queries using CTEs, JOIN clauses and UNION operators
Explored rate limiting, penalty handling and advanced testing with ephemeral databases (Testcontainers)
First integration of Telegram Bot API for event-driven notifications on ticket creation, penalties and alerts

name: Taxi-Varga
intro: Service platform, booking & fare calculation (taxi) web application
description: Taxi service web application for booking & fare calculations for different categories. Using Google Maps Platform API for real-time data regarding 'Places', 'Routes' and 'Geolocation'.
impact: Integrated Geolocation API for automatic route and cost calculation
Built custom input components combined with Google Places API for address suggestions based on user input
Real-time validation and data handling on user input
Implemented translations for German and English and themes for dark and light mode

name: Artcreation-DV
intro: Artist showcase platform, gallery/portfolio web application
description: Artist portfolio web application and showcase platform to manage and display artwork, news and other resources.
impact: Designed an art gallery component with a showroom atmosphere UI in responsive style
Implemented custom video and image preloading to improve performance and user experience
Built file handling with image preview and real-time validation
Extended translation service to handle dynamic values for validations and context-specific messages (e.g. links, emails, phone numbers)
